title: Which Eva kicks the most Ass
display_title: Which Eva kicks the most Ass
wikitext:
[]: Which Eva kicks the most Ass?             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jun 21, 2004 11:33 am I just couldn't help myself here. If you go by kills, EVA-02 leads the pack with 11 solo kills (Gaghiel, Sandelfion, and the MPs), 3 asisted (Isferal, Matriel, and Saqhiel). But In terms of Raw power I think Unit-01 has 'em all beat. Besides can we at least agree on the fact that Unit-04 has the worst record of them all?

[]: EVA-02 RULES BABY !!!             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Jun 21, 2004 11:39 am Of course Eva-02 is the best !!! and Asuka was the best pilot !!! I will never know why everybody congratulated Shinji for his fights, because the best fights were in wich Eva-01 went Berserk, and Shinji was probably just taking a nap inside the eva, waiting to get all the credit !!!!. :x

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Mon Jun 21, 2004 11:44 am Gotta go with Unit 01 on this...just the sheer power of that Eva (especially after it ingests the S2 organ) combined with that fact that it is the only one born from Lilith--its a one of a kind. And, yeah, Unit 04 stunk

[]: Why Unit-02 of course             Quote Post by Dennis » Mon Jun 21, 2004 12:07 pm Asuka's unit is great for the fact that her mother's soul, inside, saved her a caused her to kick so much ass in EoE. Also, because Asuka is the best.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Mon Jun 21, 2004 12:34 pm Hmmm... dunno. I put my vote down for Unit-02, just because of that scene in DaR (and EoE) where Asuka just all-out kicks ass like nothing else is one of my favorite moments. Also, combat-wise, Unit-02 just seems better to me... I'm just biased, whatever. :P But Unit-01 was involved in a lot of things that actually made the plot more interesting (ingesting S2 engine, being swallowed up into Sea of Dirac, going berserk, etc.) and pretty much just got the most action. And watching it go berserk and eat an Angel was pretty cool, too. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jun 21, 2004 1:14 pm Yeah Angel the other white meat.... Unit-01 did kick the majority of angel ass in the series I suppose.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Jun 21, 2004 1:48 pm I voted for unit 03, it looked so cool but never really got a chance to do much :(

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jun 21, 2004 8:23 pm Try not to forget that Unit-02/Asuka lost that battle. Unit 01 literally tears angels to shreds whenever it goes berserk, nothing can stop it. It is mankind's ultimate weapon.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jun 22, 2004 3:18 pm i think unit 1 owns all but the mass production models i think are awesome just for just pure fear of them

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Jun 22, 2004 4:00 pm Aww, no Unit 0 love here? C'mon, remember how it sniped those angels? That's true skill, right there.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jun 22, 2004 5:06 pm [quote="wildarmsheero"]Aww, no Unit 0 love here? C'mon, remember how it sniped those angels? That's true skill, right there.[/quote] ummm yea but then there was the whole self destruct thing which kinda sucked....

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Jun 22, 2004 6:06 pm Blowing your self up is pretty bad ass, my friend. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jun 22, 2004 6:45 pm Only if you survive the attack....... :roll: Ah, Jet Alone could take 'em all....

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Jun 22, 2004 7:02 pm No, it's only cool if you die! But yes, JetAlone could whoop some serious ass :P

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Jun 22, 2004 7:18 pm i think suicide is only good if lots, and i mean LOTS of people get taken out with the suicidee, so maybe if Rei had destroyed all of NERV and the angel........u never know......... twisted

[]:             Quote Post by Xenogil » Sat Jun 26, 2004 5:32 pm I'm stuck choosing between Eva unit 01 and Eva 05-13. Eva 01 had some awesome battles, but the mass-produced Evas were just plain badass. I guess I'm going with... ...Evangelion Unit 01.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jun 26, 2004 6:02 pm awww come on, no one else likes the mass productions evas over all the others?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jun 26, 2004 6:25 pm " Evangelion unit one THE DEVIL HIMSELF ! " Some Guy EoE

[]:             Quote Post by MantiCore » Sun Jun 27, 2004 12:00 am 01 gets my vote. Yui comes out more than Asuka's mother or the inner, developed Dummy Plug. 01 has the most personality toward the end of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jun 27, 2004 12:02 am glad to know im the only one who voted for the eva series
summary: []: Which Eva kicks the most Ass?             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jun 21, 2004 11:33 am I just couldn't help myself here. If you go by kills, EVA-02 leads the pack with 11 solo kills (Gaghiel, Sandelfion, and the MPs), 3 asisted (Isferal, Matriel, and Saqhiel). But In terms of Raw power I think Unit-01 has 'em all beat.
